title: Automations based on new updates
excerpt:

posts.author: M5kaminsky (matthewk@wix.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m an English writer and I have a board where I manage all my tasks. When it’s time to pass it the language lead, I create a task on the language leads, board and link it to my task.

The language lead then creates and links another task to one of three boards that are used by the language writers. Sometimes these writers have questions and leave updates on those tasks for me. I am added to a people column as the English contact on those boards.

I’d like to create an automation on those boards that whenever and update is added and I’m assigned as the English writer in the person column, that it will take the update and notify me.

Ideally I’d like it to create an update on my original task with the same content. Does anyone know how I can make that happen without an additional third party app?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a reason you use different boards instead of just setting the automation to assign the right person?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com
